name: github-download-now
description: A privacy-friendly cross-browser extension that recommends trusted GitHub Release assets, explains installation, and watches selected public repositories for updates.

scripts.test:unit: node tests/settings.test.js && node tests/tracker.test.js && node tests/url-policy.test.js && node tests/github-auth.test.js && node tests/background.test.js && node tests/build-instructions.test.js && node tests/install-guides.test.js && node tests/asset-selector.test.js && node tests/manifest.test.js && node tests/release-notes.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/url-policy.js && node --check src/tracker.js && node --check src/github-auth.js && node --check src/build-instructions.js && node --check src/install-guides.js && node --check src/asset-selector.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check src/options.js
scripts.test:ui: npm run ui-test && npm run settings-ui-test
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run verify:reproducible && npm run lint:firefox
